transactions.raw_sms_body: You have received 2000 RWF from Jane Smith (*********013) on your mobile money account at 2024-05-10 16:30:51

users.description: JSON representation of one row from the users table, showing how relational data is serialised for API responses

field_notes.full_name: String, name exactly as it appears in the SMS body
field_notes.phone: String not a number, may be masked or country-prefixed
field_notes.user_type: Enum string, one of: CUSTOMER, AGENT, MERCHANT, OWNER
field_notes.created_at: ISO 8601 datetime string, pipeline insertion time

system_logs_schema.description: Audit trail for the MoMo SMS data pipeline. Records every SMS processed, whether successfully parsed or not.

example_record.message: Successfully parsed SMS at index 1 - received transaction

field_types.log_id: integer - auto-generated by the database, never null
field_types.log_level: enum - strictly INFO, WARNING, or ERROR. Invalid values are rejected.
field_types.message: string - human-readable description of what happened. Can be null.
field_types.logged_at: datetime - automatically set to current timestamp on insert.
